title: ServerConfig fields: String instead of semantic types
description:
LOCATION: src/config.rs:17-25

FINDING: ServerConfig.bind, ServerConfig.domain, and ServerConfig.data_dir are all String. bind should be SocketAddr (or at minimum validated as one), data_dir should be PathBuf. As String, invalid values (e.g. bind = 'not-an-address') are accepted at parse time and only fail at serve time with an opaque OS error, losing the config.validate() opportunity.

IMPACT: Config validation does not catch malformed bind addresses or non-path data_dir values at startup. Operator errors produce late, context-free errors instead of actionable config parse failures.
close_reason: Deferred: config type design refactor. Ponytail comment added. Ceiling: newtype wrappers for bind addr, domain, path.
